integrationNotes: Generated from the actual GitHub repo zip; do not use old group-full-body paths.
Every image.path in images.json exists in the uploaded repository.
Loveable should fetch knowledge-index.json, then exercise-map.json, concepts.json, images.json, rest-facts.json, and optionally yoga-pose-map.json.
If an exercise id is missing, match by searchTerms or fall back to recovery/breathing.
recommendedRetrievalFlow: Load knowledge-index.json once and cache JSON for the session.
Normalize current exerciseId/exerciseName and match exercise-map.json by key or aliases.
Use exercise ontologyTopics and bookTopics to retrieve relevant ontology/book-index concepts.
Use imageIds from exercise-map first, then image-context to understand what each image shows.
Use rest-learning-paths to choose the next non-repeated anatomy/biomechanics/yoga card.
Use yoga-pose-map only for gentle complementary pose suggestions; never force deep stretching between heavy sets.
If any file fails to load, fall back to existing local RestTimer facts.
notes: v4 adds ontology.json and book-index.json as the routing bridge between exercises, body concepts, Swanson book topics, images, rest facts, and yoga pose suggestions.
